entity.description: A Levite, son of Elkanah, of the ancestry of Samuel (1 Chr. 6:25, 35).

nodes.label: Mahath
nodes.description: A Kohathite Levite, father of Elkanah (1 Chr. 6:35).

verses.text: And the sons of Elkanah; Amasai, and Ahimoth.
The son of Zuph, the son of Elkanah, the son of Mahath, the son of Amasai,
